name: Entlebuch Woodland Slices (Luzern)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the slices of toasted bread with ham, reserving 1 slice per serving.
2. Sweat the mushrooms in butter with shallot until softened.
3. Add flour and seasonings (excluding marjoram), white wine, and brown stock to the pan. Simmer for 5 minutes.
4. Stir in cream and marjoram, then quickly bring to a boil before removing from heat. Adjust seasoning as needed.
5. Arrange 3/4 of the mushrooms on top of the ham and bread slices. Place the reserved ham slice and cheese slice over each portion.
6. Brown under grill.
7. Garnish with remaining mushrooms and chopped parsley.
8. Serve on a plate with thin slices of poached pear.
